articles.title: TechnipFMC (FTI) Lands New Equinor And Eni Subsea Contracts Offshore Norway And Côte d’Ivoire
articles.summary: TechnipFMC (NYSE:FTI) has secured new subsea development contracts with Equinor offshore Norway. The company has also won subsea work with Eni for projects offshore Côte d’Ivoire. These high value awards expand TechnipFMC’s portfolio with major international energy clients. TechnipFMC enters these new contracts with Equinor and Eni after a period of strong share price performance. articles.summary: Eni (BIT:ENI) has moved further into energy transition with two linked steps: starting construction of a lithium iron phosphate battery plant in Brindisi and agreeing to buy 25% of a large Chilean lithium project. See our latest analysis for Eni. Recent trading reflects that investors are weighing Eni's pivot toward batteries and lithium alongside its core oil and gas operations.
